query:
UPDATE clientes SET cpfCnpj = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpfCnpj, '.', ''), '-', ''), '/', '') WHERE cpfCnpj LIKE '%.%' OR cpfCnpj LIKE '%-%' OR cpfCnpj LIKE '%/%';
INSERT INTO clientes (cpfCnpj, nomeCompleto, tipoPessoa) VALUES ('PENDENTE_VER', 'VERANEIDE SOARES CAMPOS LUCY', 'PF');
command:
